content:
Hi Geister

The TB mobile app doesn't support setting a message priority,

You can raise the idea / feature request on Mozilla connect and receive votes from the community. The TB team take these into consideration when deciding on development priorities and roadmaps.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android/tab/most-kudoed
creator: platform34

content:
Hi Glen

You previously asked the same question on ticket : https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/questions/1581219.

Please use the same ticket when responding about the same question.

What issue is stopping you using Thunderbird on your phone, Please describe so we can offer you some assistance. What is your concern about mail security?

If your concern relates to a feature the app doesn't currently support, please feel free to raise any suggestions and ideas you have on Mozilla connect. These ideas can then be voted on by the community.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android/tab/most-kudoed
creator: platform34
